idea-plugin.name: AI Git Commit Writer
idea-plugin.description: AI Git Commit Writer — generate Git commit messages from selected changes. Supports DeepSeek and OpenAI-compatible APIs with preset configurations. Single click in the Commit panel. No login, no background indexing.
idea-plugin.change-notes: v0.4.0: Provider dropdown (DeepSeek / OpenAI / Custom). Model dropdown with presets. API key persists across restarts.

action.description: Generate a commit message from the selected Git changes
